title: The Grand Line Gives No Mercy
description: On pages 13–15, the grand line gives no mercy as nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor.
scene: The Grand Line Gives No Mercy. Nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, having departed from little garden,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Guys listen! One day! I swear!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Cawards are the best

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The ship sails calmly along.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: splash...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Cawards are the best

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll visit Elbaf and the village of Warriors!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alright, Usopp! We'll go for sure one day!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to the home of those giants!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: El... BAF... Eeehhh~ BaaAAHHiffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff... where ev"RYONE is gigantic... 'Cause they're Giants-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: aren't those two lively...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I don't know about you guys, but I feel exhausted from all that earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Vivi... Can you keep an eye on the log pose?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: With this,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It looks like we can finally go to Alabasta.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well, that's only if,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There's no further trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes... I have to return no matter what...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: After all... I finally found a way to save Alabasta...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You are the only one who can accomplish this, Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Presently, the people have lost faith in your father, the king...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There is no other way to quell this rebellion,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: than to tell the people the truth directly from your mouth!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you absolutely must not die!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No matter how many people sacrifice themselves for you... no matter how many people you must betray... you must survive at all costs!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The path ahead of you is surely a most difficult one... and so I ask, are you prepared to not let yourself perish...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I have to survive,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: and return to Alabasta...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No need to strain yourself, VIVI.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Because I'll be by your side!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Now how would you like some petits fours as today's snack?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: For drinks, we have coffee or tea...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: SANJI...

summary: This part centers on the grand line gives no mercy, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
